messages.content: can you help me with the gameplan considering my current situation in valo

Considering your current level 15 and aim issues, I'd recommend playing a more supportive role, focusing on using your abilities to distract and disorient enemies, rather than relying solely on your aim. As Reyna, you can use your Devour ability to heal and gain a damage boost, then use your Orbs to deal damage and blind enemies, making it easier for your teammates to take them out.
i am using reyna and want to get more kills

As Reyna, to get more kills, focus on using your Devour ability to heal and gain a damage boost, then use your Orbs to scout out enemy positions and blind them, making it easier for you to take them out. Try to play aggressively, using your speed and agility to get close to enemies and take them out quickly, and use your Dismiss ability to escape from tight spots if needed.
i want a detailed tips and tricks for begginer as reyna

As a beginner playing Reyna, here are some detailed tips and tricks: 
1. Use your Devour ability to heal and gain a damage boost after getting a kill, this will help you stay alive and deal more damage.
2. Use your Orbs to scout out enemy positions and blind them, making it harder for them to aim at you.
3. Play aggressively, using your speed and agility to get close to enemies and take them out quickly.
4. Use your Dismiss ability to escape from tight spots or to reposition quickly.
5. Focus on taking out one enemy at a time, rather than trying to take on multiple enemies at once.
6. Use your ultimate ability, Empress, to become nearly invulnerable and deal massive damage to enemies within a large area.
7. Practice your aim and movement, as Reyna is a high-skill cap agent that requires good mechanics to play effectively.
8. Use your abilities to control the pace of the fight, making it easier for you to take out enemies and stay alive.
